# SultanOfSaaS

> Honest SaaS reviews with scores, pricing breakdowns, head-to-head comparisons, and stack guides for founders and operators who buy their own tools. No sponsored rankings. Updated 2026.

SultanOfSaaS covers 200+ B2B SaaS products across CRM, project management, email marketing, SEO, help desk, sales engagement, conversation intelligence, data enrichment, and AI SDR categories. Every review includes actual pricing (not "contact us"), real user complaints, and a clear recommendation. The site also publishes industry-specific guides for healthcare, e-commerce, SaaS, agencies, and 12 other verticals.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://sultanofsaas.com/): SaaS reviews, scores, and recommendations
- [All Tools](https://sultanofsaas.com/tools/): Browse all reviewed SaaS tools
- [Best Of Lists](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/): Category rankings with scoring methodology
- [Industry Guides](https://sultanofsaas.com/for/): SaaS recommendations by industry
- [Stack Guides](https://sultanofsaas.com/stacks/): Recommended tool stacks by company stage
- [Buying Guides](https://sultanofsaas.com/guides/): Deep-dive guides for SaaS buyers
- [About](https://sultanofsaas.com/about/): About SultanOfSaaS

## Best Of Lists

- [Best CRM Software](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/crm/): CRM rankings for SMBs and startups
- [Best Project Management Tools](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/project-management/): PM tool rankings
- [Best Email Marketing Platforms](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/email-marketing/): Email platform rankings
- [Best SEO Tools](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/seo-tools/): SEO tool rankings
- [Best Help Desk Software](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/help-desk/): Help desk rankings
- [Best AI SDR Tools](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/ai-sdr/): AI sales development rep tools
- [Best Sales Engagement Platforms](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/sales-engagement/): Outreach and engagement tools
- [Best Conversation Intelligence](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/conversation-intelligence/): Call recording and analysis tools
- [Best Data Enrichment Tools](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/data-enrichment/): Contact and company data tools
- [Best AI Tools for Small Business](https://sultanofsaas.com/best/ai-tools/): AI tool rankings

- [Mailchimp vs ConvertKit](https://sultanofsaas.com/mailchimp-vs-convertkit/): Email platform comparison
- [Asana vs Monday](https://sultanofsaas.com/asana-vs-monday/): PM tool comparison
- [Gong vs Chorus](https://sultanofsaas.com/gong-vs-chorus/): Conversation intelligence comparison
